chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1352 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 17-09-2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Ansari, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State >>>>>><<<<<<< By filing statement along with certain documents, learned counsel for the Petitioners under instructions does not press the instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
